svg.title: CVD recourse pipeline control flow (corrected counts)
svg.desc: Train phase (offline): 707 cleaned rows split into a 565-row train set that fits both the XGBoost model and the SCM, serialized to model files. Inference phase: the 142-row held-out test split is scored, and selecting true-positive high-risk patients yields a 48-patient cohort, on which DiCE generates counterfactuals validated by the loaded SCM over 100 iterations, then aggregated by CIComputer.

g.text: ×100 iterations · for each of the 48 patients
